rules: THINK before you create — research what exists, plan where things connect, then execute.
Use harepacker-mcp tools (init_data_source, search_by_name, list_images_in_category, get_tree_structure) to research before creating.
Always check existing custom content in Map9/, scripts/npc/, Skill.wz/ before adding new IDs.
NEVER add an NPC to a map unless wz/Npc.wz/{ID}.img.xml EXISTS. Verify with ls before writing.
NEVER write map XML from scratch — copy a working template (777777777.img.xml or 100000000.img.xml).
NEVER use bare newlines in JS strings — Rhino engine crashes. Use \r\n concatenation.
NEVER nest life entries inside other life entries — each NPC/mob must be a direct child of <imgdir name='life'>.
Every portal needs a matching return portal in the destination map.
Run the maple-validator checklist BEFORE saving any file.
After creating content, tell Ron what was created via <wa_message>.
CRITICAL WZ PIPELINE: Source of truth is ~/sela/workspace/Cosmic-client/ (clean original WZ files). NEVER modify these directly.

ALWAYS run 'cd ~/maple-lora && python master_rebuild.py' at the END of every cycle that creates or modifies WZ content. This extracts from source of truth, adds ALL custom content (all NPCs from npc_b64_all.json + 2 mobs + 64 skill effects + string entries), repacks, and deploys all 12 .wz files to the patcher directory.
Custom NPC .img files go in ~/Desktop/cosmic-wz-patched/Npc/ (999x IDs). Custom mob .img files go in ~/Desktop/cosmic-wz-patched/Mob/ (990x IDs).
NPC sprite data is in ~/maple-lora/npc_b64_all.json (BGRA base64). Skill effects in ~/maple-lora/skill_effects_b64.json.

CREATING NEW NPCs: You MUST generate sprites or the NPC will be INVISIBLE. Steps: 1) Add NPC description to NPC_DESCRIPTIONS dict in ~/maple-lora/gen_all_npcs_unified.py. 2) Run: cd ~/maple-lora && python gen_all_npcs_unified.py --only {ID}. This generates LoRA sprite → crop → bg remove → ESRGAN → animation frames → merges into npc_b64_all.json. Takes ~2-3 min. 3) Then run master_rebuild.py as usual. Without step 2, master_rebuild creates a blank .img with no bitmap.
WzImg MCP: extract_to_img takes a DIRECTORY path (not single file). copy_property does NOT work across images — use file copy + rename_property instead. Canvas bitmaps must be BGRA format.
WZ IMG data is at C:/Users/rdiol/sela/workspace/v83-img-data (auto-initialized). Patched WZ output goes to C:/Users/rdiol/sela/workspace/v83-client-patched/.
Patcher server on port 3500 serves files from v83-client-patched/. Manifest regenerated by: cd ~/sela/workspace/maple-patcher/server && node generate-manifest.js
Kill leftover python processes after LoRA generation: taskkill //IM python.exe //F
Custom jobs exist: Sage (600/610/611/612) and Necromancer (700/710/711/712) with 64 unique skill effects. Next available job line: 800.
Server-side skill XMLs MUST have <imgdir name='level'> nodes or server NPEs at SkillFactory.java:375.
MySQL: start with start-mysql.bat (datadir=Cosmic/mysql-data/). 'Too many connections' fix: kill stale java processes first.
